## 📝 User Story

**As a** [persona],  
**I want to** [task the persona wants to accomplish],  
**So that** [objective/benefit expected].  

---

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Criterion 1: Clearly defines what must be achieved for the User Story to be considered complete.
- [ ] Criterion 2: Covers edge cases and expected behaviors.
- [ ] Criterion 3: Includes necessary validations or business rules.
- [ ] Add more criteria as needed.
---
## 📂 Notes
[Include any extra details, dependencies, or design references if needed.]
